What We Do

OUR CONCRETE SERVICES

Every job — residential or commercial — gets the same treatment: proper prep, quality mix, clean finish. No shortcuts.

01
🚗
Driveways
Proper subbase prep, reinforced pour, and clean finish — built to handle Minnesota freeze-thaw cycles year after year.
  • New driveway installation
  • Driveway replacement & removal
  • Apron repair & extension
  • Broom or exposed aggregate finish
02
☀️
Patios
Turn your backyard into usable outdoor space. Flat, level slabs built to last — with design options from simple to stamped.
  • Custom patio design & pour
  • Hot tub & grill pad slabs
  • Pool decks
  • Multi-level layouts
03
🎨
Stamped Concrete
High-end look without the high-end price tag. Custom patterns and color that hold up to heavy use and MN winters.
  • Stamped pattern & texture options
  • Integral color & staining
  • Exposed aggregate
  • Border & inlay designs
04
🚶
Sidewalks & Steps
Safe, straight pathways and front entry steps that make a strong first impression and hold up through years of use.
  • Sidewalk installation & repair
  • Front entry steps & landings
  • Walkway systems
  • ADA-compliant slopes
05
🏗️
Garage Floors & Slabs
Flat, smooth garage floors and outbuilding slabs — poured with proper drainage slope and a finish that lasts.
  • Garage floor replacement
  • Shed & outbuilding slabs
  • Shop floors
  • Drain installation
06
🏢
Commercial Concrete
Parking lots, warehouse floors, and commercial exterior work — on schedule, on spec, and built for heavy-duty use.
  • Parking lot sections
  • Loading dock approaches
  • Commercial sidewalks
  • Industrial floor pours

Who We Are

Concrete Done Right, Every Time

Weinandt Concrete was founded in 2021 by Kyle Weinandt — a concrete professional with over 8 years of hands-on industry experience before going independent. The company is built on one principle: do the job right the first time, because concrete is permanent.

We take on jobs we can execute well. That means you get us on-site — not a rotating sub crew — and you get the attention and craftsmanship that produces referrals and repeat customers.

The W Stamp

Every project we complete gets the W stamp. It's a mark of accountability — we put our name on the work because we stand behind it.

  • Founded 2021 · 8+ years industry experience
  • Fully licensed and insured in Minnesota
  • Liability and workers' comp coverage
  • Transparent pricing — no surprise charges
  • Owner present and involved on every job
Why We Win Repeat Business

Homeowners call us back because the first job held up and looked great. We don't rush, we don't cut corners on base prep, and we communicate clearly throughout. That's how a service business grows without advertising.
